PETITIONER BLACKSTONE TECHNOLOGY GROUP'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR AN ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (CCP 1285, 1285.4, 1286, 1287.4) IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED.
